title: Welcome to the experiment!
content:
In this experiment, you will choose the color of the word that you see.

Press the LEFT arrow key for a word in red, the UP arrow key for a word in blue, or the RIGHT arrow key for a word in green.

Respond as quickly and accurately as you can. Let's do some practice.
